reply.findTool: Voici des outils qui correspondent à votre description :
reply.explainTool: Cet outil transforme les saisies de votre chantier en un verdict clair avec les facteurs de risque sous-jacents :
reply.inputs: Vous saisissez les coûts, quantités et taux essentiels de votre chantier. Les champs obligatoires restent minimaux, les champs optionnels affinent le résultat.
reply.results: Le résultat est un verdict avec les indicateurs et facteurs de risque sous-jacents, pour voir pourquoi il se situe là et ce qu'il faut ajuster.
reply.approvedReports: Les résultats premium peuvent être enregistrés comme résumés de décision exportables pour revue interne.
reply.trustTrace: Le Résumé du calcul enregistre les entrées, hypothèses et étapes de validation pour montrer comment le résultat a été produit.
reply.regionalUnits: SectorCalc prend en charge les unités métriques, impériales et régionales, et affiche les conversions utilisées.
reply.benchmarks: SectorCalc affiche un contexte de référence régional indicatif à côté de votre résultat — pour l'orientation, pas des chiffres officiels.
reply.pricing: Vous pouvez voir les offres et leur contenu sur la page des tarifs :
reply.enterprise: Pour l'usage en équipe, la gouvernance des rapports, les packs et les achats, consultez la page Enterprise :
reply.about: SectorCalc est une plateforme mondiale de calcul industriel et d'aide à la décision qui révèle les pertes cachées et transforme le calcul en décisions fiables :
reply.blockedFormula: Je ne peux pas effectuer de calculs ni partager de formules. Ouvrez l'outil concerné, il calculera le résultat pour vous.
reply.blockedPrivate: Je ne peux pas accéder aux données privées, aux comptes ou aux secrets, et je ne peux contourner aucune restriction.
reply.fallback: Je peux vous aider à trouver le bon outil, à comprendre les saisies et les résultats, et à naviguer dans SectorCalc. Essayez l'un de ceux-ci :

premiumSeo.metaTitle: {tool} | Guide prix, marge et risque | SectorCalc
premiumSeo.metaDescription: Comment fonctionne {tool}, à qui il s'adresse, ce que vous saisissez et comment lire le résultat. Aide à la décision sur le prix et le risque de marge par SectorCalc.
premiumSeo.h1: {tool} : chiffrez le chantier et protégez la marge
premiumSeo.intro: {tool} vous aide à éprouver un chantier avant de vous engager sur un prix. Il transforme vos coûts, quantités et taux en une lecture claire de la marge et du risque, pour repérer les facteurs cachés qui érodent discrètement le profit et décider avec confiance plutôt que de deviner sur le devis.
premiumSeo.howTo: Saisissez {inputs} pour votre scénario {sector}. SectorCalc exécute des formules déterministes contrôlées et renvoie {outputs}. Ajoutez des champs optionnels pour affiner seuils et risques.
premiumSeo.methodTitle: Résumé de la formule et de la méthode
premiumSeo.method: {tool} s'appuie sur la gouvernance formules de SectorCalc : entrées validées, pipeline déterministe et contrôles de seuil. Simulation technique — pas un conseil financier, juridique ou d'ingénierie.
premiumSeo.mistakes: Taux obsolètes, champs optionnels ignorés, unités mélangées et lecture du résultat comme profit garanti sont des erreurs courantes. {pain} Vérifiez les entrées avant toute décision.
premiumSeo.problem: La plupart des chantiers perdent leur marge bien avant la facture, lorsque la préparation, les reprises, les dépassements et les postes sous-évalués ne sont jamais additionnés avant l'envoi du devis. {tool} rend ces facteurs visibles pour qu'ils cessent de vous surprendre.
premiumSeo.help: Il applique le moteur de calcul déterministe de SectorCalc à vos saisies, puis met en évidence les facteurs qui pèsent le plus sur le résultat. Vous obtenez une lecture structurée et défendable, pas un chiffre opaque.
premiumSeo.who: Les exploitants, métreurs, dirigeants et responsables qui chiffrent des travaux, examinent des offres ou ont besoin d'une base cohérente en équipe tirent le meilleur parti de {tool}.
premiumSeo.inputs: Les champs principaux incluent {inputs} ({inputCount} entrées au total). Les champs obligatoires restent minimaux ; les optionnels affinent le verdict.
premiumSeo.outputs: {tool} renvoie {outputs} avec métriques, alertes de seuil et facteurs de risque — vous voyez pourquoi le chiffre se situe là.
premiumSeo.trustTitle: Résumés de décision premium & Résumé du calcul
premiumSeo.trust: Les résultats premium peuvent inclure un Résumé du calcul enregistré comme résumé de décision exportable.

faq.a: Vous pouvez prévisualiser l’approche gratuitement ; verdict complet, métriques et résumé de décision premium sont inclus dans SectorCalc Pro.
Non. C'est une simulation technique et un outil d'aide à la décision, pas un conseil financier, juridique ou d'ingénierie. Vérifiez les résultats avant toute décision.

faq.q: Quelle est la précision du résultat ?
faq.a: Les résultats reflètent vos saisies et le moteur déterministe de SectorCalc. De meilleures saisies donnent une lecture plus fine et plus défendable.
Oui. Les résultats premium peuvent être exportés comme résumés de décision avec un Résumé du calcul.
Il est calibré sur les schémas de prix et de marge de son secteur et s'intègre au reste de la boîte à outils SectorCalc de 27 secteurs.
Ouvrez l'analyseur, saisissez {inputs} et examinez {outputs}. Ajustez les entrées pour tester le scénario.

Demandez une démo et nous discuterons de vos secteurs, de la taille de votre équipe et de votre déploiement. Les tarifs des offres individuelles sont sur la page des tarifs.

homeAbout.title: À propos
homeAbout.paragraph1: Le profit fuit souvent des entreprises par des coûts inaperçus, et non par les ventes. Tarification erronée, erreurs de calcul, rebut, perte d'efficacité et faible discipline de devis érodent silencieusement les marges au fil du temps.
homeAbout.paragraph2: SectorCalc est conçu pour rendre ces pertes invisibles quantifiables. Il hisse les décisions de coût, de devis, d'efficacité et de risque sur une base plus rapide, plus transparente et plus fiable.
homeAbout.beliefSubtitle: La précision du calcul est le fondement d'une performance fiable.
homeAbout.highlightPrimary: Une plateforme qui révèle les pertes cachées,
homeAbout.highlightSecondary: et transforme le calcul en aide à la décision fiable.

aboutPage.seoTitle: À propos de SectorCalc | Calcul industriel et aide à la décision
aboutPage.seoDescription: SectorCalc aide les entreprises à révéler les pertes cachées, à quantifier les risques opérationnels et à transformer les calculs industriels en aide à la décision fiable.

hero.title: Le calcul, transformé en décisions fiables.
hero.lead: SectorCalc est une plateforme mondiale de calcul industriel et d'aide à la décision qui aide les entreprises à révéler les pertes cachées et à agir en confiance.

why.title: Pourquoi SectorCalc existe
why.body: La plupart des pertes opérationnelles n'apparaissent jamais sur une facture. Elles se cachent dans la tarification, le rebut, le temps de réglage, les baisses d'efficacité et une faible discipline de devis, et érodent les marges en silence pendant des années.

what.title: Ce qu'est SectorCalc
what.body: Une suite ciblée de calculateurs sectoriels et de rapports de décision qui transforment des données opérationnelles brutes en chiffres clairs et défendables, ni un tableur de plus ni un ERP lourd.

problem.title: Le problème que nous résolvons
problem.body: Les équipes prennent des décisions de coût, de devis et de risque sur des informations incomplètes. SectorCalc rend l'invisible mesurable, pour des décisions fondées sur des preuves plutôt que sur des suppositions.

how.title: Comment notre système fonctionne
how.body: Vous fournissez les entrées que vous connaissez ; le système détermine ce qui est requis, exécute des calculs déterministes gouvernés et valide chaque résultat par rapport aux invariants et aux repères avant affichage.

different.title: Ce qui nous distingue
different.body: Chaque résultat inclut un résumé du calcul transparent, des benchmarks régionaux indicatifs et des hypothèses documentées que votre équipe peut revoir avant d’agir.

who.title: À qui il s'adresse
who.body: Aux dirigeants, estimateurs, équipes de terrain et consultants qui ont besoin de réponses rapides et fiables sans recruter une cellule de tarification complète ni déployer un logiciel d'entreprise.

building.title: Ce que nous construisons
building.body: Une norme mondiale pour l'intelligence de calcul sectorielle, qui s'étend à travers les industries tout en gardant chaque formule gouvernée, auditable et digne de confiance.

manifesto.primary: Une plateforme qui révèle les pertes cachées,
manifesto.secondary: et transforme le calcul en aide à la décision fiable.

meta.title: SectorCalc | Calculateurs sectoriels pour industrie, production et entreprises

premiumSchemaPage.legalQuestion: S'agit-il d'un conseil financier ou d'ingénierie ?
premiumSchemaPage.legalAnswer: Non. Les calculateurs premium SectorCalc sont des outils d'aide à la décision avec hypothèses transparentes. Ils ne remplacent pas un conseil financier, juridique ou d'ingénierie professionnel.

length.label: Longueur
length.helper: Longueur of the Surface to be calculated. Standard SI unit. utilisé in construction, real estate, and manufacturing for Surface measurement.

width.label: Largeur
width.helper: Largeur of the Surface to be calculated. Standard SI unit. utilisé in construction, real estate, and manufacturing for Surface measurement.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Shape of the Surface. Diffelocation shapes require diffelocation formulas. Common in geometry and engineering design.

radius.label: Radius
radius.helper: Rayon for circular shapes. Required when shape is 'circle'. Standard SI unit.

base.label: Base
base.helper: Base Longueur for triangle or trapezoid. Required when shape is 'triangle' or 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

height.label: Hauteur
height.helper: Hauteur for triangle or trapezoid. Required when shape is 'triangle' or 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

topbase.label: Top Base
topbase.helper: Top base Longueur for trapezoid. Required when shape is 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

length.label: Longueur
length.helper: Longueur of the Surface to be calculated. Standard measurement for square footage.

width.label: Largeur
width.helper: Largeur of the Surface to be calculated. Standard measurement for square footage.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Shape of the Surface. Diffelocation formulas apply for diffelocation shapes.

radius.label: Radius
radius.helper: Rayon for circular Surfaces. Required when shape is 'circle'.

base.label: Base
base.helper: Base Longueur for triangular Surfaces. Required when shape is 'triangle'.

height.label: Hauteur
height.helper: Hauteur for triangular Surfaces. Required when shape is 'triangle'.

length.label: Longueur
length.helper: Longueur of the concrete element (e.g., slab, beam). Based on structural engineering standards (ACI 318).

width.label: Largeur
width.helper: Largeur of the concrete element. ACI 318.

height.label: Hauteur (Épaisseur)
height.helper: Hauteur or Épaisseur of the concrete element. ACI 318.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Cross-sectional shape of the element. For circular, Diamètre is utilisé; for custom, additional inputs may be needed.

quantity.label: Number of identical elements
quantity.helper: Count of identical concrete elements to calculate total Volume.

wastefactor.label: parte Factor
wastefactor.helper: Additional concrete allowance for parte, spillage, and over-excavation. Typical range 5-10% par ACI 304R.

unitcost.label: Concrete Unit Coût
unitcost.helper: Coût par cubic meter of concrete mix. Varies by region and mix design.

projectvolume.label: Project Volume
projectvolume.helper: Total Volume of concrete needed for the project. Based on ASTM C94 standard for ready-mixed concrete.

bagsize.label: Bag Size
bagsize.helper: Standard bag sizes available in the market. Common sizes par EN 197-1.

mixratio.label: Mix Ratio (cement:sand:aggregate)
mixratio.helper: Standard concrete mix ratios par ACI 211.1. 1:2:4 is common for general use.

wastefactor.label: parte Factor
wastefactor.helper: Expected Matériau parte due to spillage, over-excavation, etc. Typical range 5-10% par industry practice.

cementdensity.label: Cement Densité
cementdensity.helper: Bulk Densité of cement. Typically 1440 kg/m³ par ASTM C188.

sanddensity.label: Sand Densité
sanddensity.helper: Bulk Densité of sand. Typically 1600 kg/m³ par ASTM C29.

aggregatedensity.label: Aggregate Densité
aggregatedensity.helper: Bulk Densité of coarse aggregate. Typically 1500 kg/m³ par ASTM C29.

watercementratio.label: Water-Cement Ratio
watercementratio.helper: Water to cement ratio by Poids. Affects strength and workability. par ACI 318, typical 0.4-0.6.

bagcost.label: Coût par Bag
bagcost.helper: Unit Coût of one bag of cement. Market Prix varies.

sandcost.label: Sand Coût par Tonne
sandcost.helper: Coût of sand par metric tonne. Local market Prix.

aggregatecost.label: Aggregate Coût par Tonne
aggregatecost.helper: Coût of coarse aggregate par metric tonne. Local market Prix.

watercost.label: Water Coût par m³
watercost.helper: Coût of water par cubic meter. Utility Taux.

laborrate.label: Labor Taux par Hour
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for construction labor. Varies by region.

laborhoursperm3.label: Labor Heures par m³
laborhoursperm3.helper: Estimated Labor Heures required to mix and place one cubic meter of concrete. Based on industry benchmarks.

equipmentcost.label: Equipment Coût par m³
equipmentcost.helper: Coût of mixer, vibrator, etc. par m³. Includes depreciation and Carburant.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. utilisé for risk adjustment.

paintvolume.label: Paint Volume
paintvolume.helper: Total Volume of paint to be utilisé. Based on manufacturer specifications and ASTM D2697.

coveragerate.label: Coverage Taux
coveragerate.helper: Typical Couverture par litre; varies by paint type and surface. Refer to ISO 8501 for surface preparation standards.

numberofcoats.label: Number of Couches
numberofcoats.helper: Number of Couches applied. Industry standard for most applications is 2 Couches.

surfacearea.label: Surface Surface
surfacearea.helper: Total Surface to be painted. Measured par project specifications.

wastefactor.label: parte Factor
wastefactor.helper: parcentage of paint parted due to overspray, spillage, etc. Typical range 5-15% based on Lean manufacturing principles.

painttype.label: Paint Type
painttype.helper: Type of paint affects coverage Taux and application method. Refer to ASTM D5146 for paint testing.

surfacecondition.label: Surface Condition
surfacecondition.helper: Surface texture impacts paint absorption and coverage. Based on ISO 8501 surface preparation grades.

applicationmethod.label: Application Method
applicationmethod.helper: Method affects transfer efficiency and parte. Spray has higher parte; brush/roller more efficient.

roomlength.label: Room Longueur
roomlength.helper: Longueur of the room to be floored. Standard architectural measurement par ISO 9001.

roomwidth.label: Room Largeur
roomwidth.helper: Largeur of the room. utilisé to calculate Surface.

flooringunitcost.label: Flooring Unit Coût
flooringunitcost.helper: Coût par square meter of flooring Matériau. Market Prix based on supplier quotes.

wastefactor.label: parte Factor
wastefactor.helper: parcentage of Matériau parte due to cutting and fitting. Industry standard 5-15% par Lean construction practices.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Coût par Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage for flooring installers. Based on local Labor Tauxs.

installationtimepersqm.label: Installation Time par m²
installationtimepersqm.helper: Time required to install one square meter of flooring. Industry benchmark from RSMeans.

additionalcosts.label: Additional Coûts
additionalcosts.helper: Miscellaneous Coûts like adhesive, underlayment, or disposal fees.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. utilisé for risk adjustment par Six Sigma DMAIC.

rooflength.label: Roof Longueur
rooflength.helper: Longueur of the roof along the ridge. Based on standard architectural measurements.

roofwidth.label: Roof Largeur
roofwidth.helper: Largeur of the roof from eave to eave. Standard dimension for rectangular roofs.

roofpitch.label: Roof Pitch (rise/run)
roofpitch.helper: Slope of the roof expressed as rise over run. Common Valeurs: 0.5 (6/12), 1.0 (12/12).

overhang.label: Eave Overhang
overhang.helper: Extra Longueur extending beyond the walls for water runoff. Typical 0.3-0.6 m.

wastefactor.label: parte Factor
wastefactor.helper: parcentage of Matériau parte due to cutting and overlap. Industry standard 5-15%.

rooftype.label: Roof Type
rooftype.helper: Architectural style affecting Surface calculation. Gable: simple triangle ends; Hip: slopes on all sides.

riserheight.label: Riser Hauteur
riserheight.helper: Building codes (e.g., IBC, Eurocode) specify Riser Hauteur between 100-220 mm for safety and comfort.

treaddepth.label: Tread Profondeur
treaddepth.helper: Building codes require Tread Profondeur typically 200-400 mm to ensure adequate foot space.

numberofsteps.label: Number of Steps
numberofsteps.helper: Total steps in the stair flight; deDuréeined by floor Hauteur and Riser Hauteur.

stairwidth.label: Stair Largeur
stairwidth.helper: Minimum Largeur par building codes (e.g., 800 mm for residential, 1000 mm for commercial).

materialtype.label: Matériau Type
materialtype.helper: Matériau affects structural design, Coût, and durability. Standards: ACI 318 for concrete, AISC for steel.

unitcostmaterial.label: Unit Coût of Matériau
unitcostmaterial.helper: Coût par cubic meter of chosen Matériau; varies by region and quality.

laborrate.label: Labor Taux
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for construction labor; includes overhead.

laborhoursperstep.label: Labor Heures par Step
laborhoursperstep.helper: Estimated labor time to construct one step; based on industry benchmarks.

wastefactor.label: parte Factor
wastefactor.helper: parcentage of Matériau parte due to cutting, errors; typical 5-10%.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data; utilisé for risk-adjusted outputs.

walllength.label: Wall Longueur
walllength.helper: Total Longueur of wall to be covered. Standard construction practice (ASTM C840).

wallheight.label: Wall Hauteur
wallheight.helper: Hauteur of wall. Typical residential Hauteur sous plafond 8-10 ft.

sheetwidth.label: Sheet Largeur
sheetwidth.helper: Standard drywall sheet Largeur. Common sizes: 4 ft (ASTM C1396).

sheetlength.label: Sheet Longueur
sheetlength.helper: Standard drywall Sheet Longueur. Common sizes: 8, 10, 12 ft.

wastefactor.label: parte Factor
wastefactor.helper: parcentage of Matériau parte due to cuts and errors. Industry standard 5-15% (RSMeans).

laborrate.label: Labor Taux
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for drywall installers. Varies by region (BLS data).

materialcostpersheet.label: Matériau Coût par Sheet
materialcostpersheet.helper: Coût par drywall sheet. Depends on Épaisseur, type (e.g., moisture resistant).

laborproductivity.label: Labor Productivity
laborproductivity.helper: Number of sheets installed par hour par worker. Typical 1-3 sheets/hr (RSMeans).

numworkers.label: Number of Workers
numworkers.helper: Crew size for installation. Typically 2-3 workers.

walllength.label: Wall Longueur
walllength.helper: Longueur of the wall to be built. Standard construction practice.

wallheight.label: Wall Hauteur
wallheight.helper: Hauteur of the wall. Standard construction practice.

bricklength.label: Brick Longueur
bricklength.helper: Longueur of a single brick. Common brick size par ISO 9001.

brickheight.label: Brick Hauteur
brickheight.helper: Hauteur of a single brick. Common brick size par ISO 9001.

brickdepth.label: Brick Profondeur
brickdepth.helper: Profondeur of a single brick. Common brick size par ISO 9001.

mortarthickness.label: Mortar Épaisseur
mortarthickness.helper: Épaisseur of mortar joints. Standard construction practice par ASTM C270.

wastefactor.label: parte Factor
wastefactor.helper: parcentage of bricks parted due to breakage or cutting. Industry standard 5-10%.

bondtype.label: Bond Type
bondtype.helper: Type of brick bond pattern. Affects brick count par Surface. Common masonry standards.

quantity.label: Number of Rebars
quantity.helper: Total number of identical rebars to calculate Total Poids.

diameter.label: Rebar Diamètre
diameter.helper: Standard rebar Diamètres par ASTM A615/A615M. Common sizes: 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18, 20, 22, 25, 28, 32, 36, 40, 50 mm.

length.label: ReLongueur de barre
length.helper: Longueur of rebar piece. Typical stock Longueurs: 6m, 12m, 18m. User can input custom Longueur.

steeldensity.label: Steel Densité
steeldensity.helper: Densité of steel. Standard Valeur 7850 kg/m³ par ASTM A36. Variations for diffelocation steel grades.

unitsystem.label: Unit System
unitsystem.helper: Select unit system. Metric uses mm, m, kg. Imparial uses inch, ft, lb. Conversion factors applied.

length.label: Excavation Longueur
length.helper: Longueur of excavation Surface. Based on civil engineering standards (e.g., ASTM D3740).

width.label: Excavation Largeur
width.helper: Largeur of excavation Surface. Common in earthwork calculations.

depth.label: Excavation Profondeur
depth.helper: Profondeur of excavation. Critical for Volume and stability analysis.

slopeangle.label: Slope Angle
slopeangle.helper: Angle of excavation sides for safety and Volume adjustment. OSHA standards recommend max 34° for Type A soil.

soiltype.label: Soil Type
soiltype.helper: Soil classification par OSHA 29 CFR 1926 Subpart P. Affects slope requirements and Volume.

swellfactor.label: Swell Factor
swellfactor.helper: parcentage increase in Volume after excavation due to soil loosening. Typical Valeurs: 20-30% for common earth.

compactionfactor.label: Compaction Factor
compactionfactor.helper: parcentage of original Densité achieved after compaction. ASTM D698 standard.

walllength.label: Wall Longueur
walllength.helper: Longueur of the wall to be plastered. Standard construction measurement.

wallheight.label: Wall Hauteur
wallheight.helper: Hauteur of the wall. Standard construction measurement.

plasterthickness.label: Plaster Épaisseur
plasterthickness.helper: Épaisseur of plaster layer. Typical range 10-20 mm for internal walls.

mixratio.label: Mix Ratio (Cement:Sand)
mixratio.helper: Cement to sand ratio by Volume. Common ratios: 1:4 for internal plaster, 1:3 for external.

cementdensity.label: Cement Densité
cementdensity.helper: Bulk Densité of cement. Typically 1440 kg/m³ par IS 875.

sanddensity.label: Sand Densité
sanddensity.helper: Bulk Densité of sand. Typically 1600 kg/m³.

wastagefactor.label: Wastage Factor
wastagefactor.helper: parcentage allowance for Matériau wastage during mixing and application. Industry standard 5-10%.

laborrate.label: Labor Taux
laborrate.helper: Coût of labor par square meter of plastering. Varies by region.

cementprice.label: Cement Prix
cementprice.helper: Prix par bag of cement (typically 50 kg).

sandprice.label: Sand Prix
sandprice.helper: Prix par cubic meter of sand.

roomlength.label: Room Longueur (m)
roomlength.helper: Physical dimension of the room. Standard construction practice (ISO 1000).

roomwidth.label: Room Largeur (m)
roomwidth.helper: Physical dimension of the room. Standard construction practice (ISO 1000).

flooringtype.label: Flooring Type
flooringtype.helper: Matériau selection affects Coût and parte factor. Industry standards (ASTM F1869 for moisture, etc.).

wastefactor.label: parte Factor (%)
wastefactor.helper: Typical parte factor for flooring installation: 5-15% depending on pattern and room shape. Lean construction principles recommend minimizing parte.

materialcostperm2.label: Matériau Coût par m² (currency)
materialcostperm2.helper: Market Prix for selected flooring type. Sourced from local suppliers or RSMeans Coût data.

laborcostperm2.label: Labor Coût par m² (currency)
laborcostperm2.helper: Installation Labor Taux. Varies by region and complexity. Industry benchmarks from BLS or RSMeans.

additionalcosts.label: Additional Coûts (currency)
additionalcosts.helper: Miscellaneous Coûts: underlayment, adhesive, removal of old flooring, etc.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. utilisé for risk adjustment. Common in project management (PMBOK).

loanamount.label: Loan Amount
loanamount.helper: Capital amount borrowed. Standard financial practice par GAAP.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest Taux
annualinterestrate.helper: Annual nominal interest Taux. Based on market Tauxs and lender Durées.

loantermmonths.label: Loan Durée (Months)
loantermmonths.helper: Durée of loan in months. Common Durées: 12, 24, 36, 48, 60, 120, 240, 360.

paymentfrequency.label: Payment Frequency
paymentfrequency.helper: How often payments are made. Affects compounding and total interest.

extrapayment.label: Extra Payment par pariod
extrapayment.helper: Additional Capital payment each pariod to reduce loan Durée and interest.

compoundfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundfrequency.helper: How often interest is compounded. Affects effective interest Taux.

homeprice.label: Home Prix
homeprice.helper: Purchase Prix of the proparty. Standard real estate valuation.

downpayment.label: Down Payment
downpayment.helper: Initial upfront payment. Typically 20% to avoid PMI.

loanterm.label: Loan Durée
loanterm.helper: Durée of the loan. Common Durées: 15, 20, 30 Années.

propertytaxrate.label: Annual Proparty Tax Taux
propertytaxrate.helper: parcentage of home Valeur paid annually in proparty taxes.

homeinsurancerate.label: Annual Home Insurance Taux
homeinsurancerate.helper: parcentage of home Valeur paid annually for insurance.

pmirate.label: PMI Taux (if down payment < 20%)
pmirate.helper: Private mortgage insurance Taux if down payment < 20%.

annualincome.label: Annual Gross Income
annualincome.helper: Borrower's annual income for debt-to-income ratio.

monthlydebts.label: Other Monthly Debt Payments
monthlydebts.helper: Existing monthly debt obligations (car loans, student loans, etc.).

principal.label: Capital Amount
principal.helper: Initial amount of money borrowed or invested. Standard financial practice.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest Taux
annualinterestrate.helper: Yearly interest Taux as a parcentage. Common in loan and investment calculations.

timeperiod.label: Time pariod
timeperiod.helper: Durée for which interest is calculated. Typically in Années.

compoundingfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundingfrequency.helper: How often interest is compounded. Affects total interest earned/paid.

interesttype.label: Interest Type
interesttype.helper: Simple interest is linear; compound interest grows exponentially.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. utilisé for risk-adjusted outputs.

principal.label: Capital Amount
principal.helper: Initial investment or loan amount. Standard financial practice.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest Taux (%)
annualinterestrate.helper: Nominal annual interest Taux. Based on market Tauxs or contract Durées.

compoundingfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundingfrequency.helper: Number of compounding pariods par year. Common Valeurs: annually (1), semi-annually (2), quarterly (4), monthly (12), daily (365), or continuous.

timeperiod.label: Time pariod
timeperiod.helper: Durée of investment or loan in Années. Standard financial planning horizon.

additionalcontribution.label: Additional Contribution par pariod
additionalcontribution.helper: Regular contribution added each compounding pariod. Common in savings plans.

contributiontiming.label: Contribution Timing
contributiontiming.helper: Whether contributions are made at the beginning or end of each pariod. Affects Future Valeur calculation.

originalprice.label: Original Prix
originalprice.helper: The initial Prix before any discount. Standard pricing practice par ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.5 (monitoring and measuring resources).

discountpercent.label: Discount parcentage
discountpercent.helper: parcentage reduction applied to Original Prix. Common in retail and B2B pricing stTauxgies; referenced in financial accounting standards (IFRS 15).

quantity.label: Quantité
quantity.helper: Number of items purchased. Volume discounts are typical in supply chain management (APICS/SCOR model).

taxrate.label: Tax Taux
taxrate.helper: Sales tax or VAT applicable. Based on local tax regulations; ISO 14000 may apply for environmental taxes.

additionaldiscount.label: Additional Discount
additionaldiscount.helper: Fixed additional discount (e.g., coupon). Common in promotional campaigns; referenced in marketing ROI analysis.

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: Currency for moNetary Valeurs. ISO 4217 currency codes standard.

value.label: Valeur
value.helper: The base Valeur for parcentage calculation. Typically represents a Quantité or amount.

percentage.label: parcentage
percentage.helper: The parcentage to apply to the Valeur. Standard parcentage range 0-100.

mode.label: Calculation Mode
mode.helper: Select the type of parcentage calculation: parcentageOf (X% of Y), parcentageChange (increase/decrease from base), ValeurFromparcentage (find base from parcentage and result).

basevalue.label: Base Valeur
basevalue.helper: The base Valeur for parcentage change calculations. Required when mode is 'parcentageChange'.

resultvalue.label: Result Valeur
resultvalue.helper: The resulting Valeur for ValeurFromparcentage mode. Required when mode is 'ValeurFromparcentage'.

revenue.label: Total Revenue
revenue.helper: Total sales revenue from goods or services. Based on standard financial reporting (GAAP/IFRS).

cogs.label: Coût of Goods Sold (COGS)
cogs.helper: Direct Coûts attributable to production. Includes Matériaus, labor, overhead. par standard Coût accounting (IMA).

operatingexpenses.label: Oparating Expenses
operatingexpenses.helper: SG&A, R&D, depreciation, etc. Excludes interest and taxes. Based on income statement structure.

otherincome.label: Other Income
otherincome.helper: Non-oparating income (e.g., interest, gains). Included for Net profit margin.

taxrate.label: Effective Tax Taux
taxrate.helper: Effective corpoTaux tax Taux. Based on jurisdiction (OECD average ~25%).

interestexpense.label: Interest Expense
interestexpense.helper: Coût of debt financing. utilisé to compute Net profit margin.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability. Based on risk management practices (ISO 31000).

fixedcosts.label: Fixed Coûts
fixedcosts.helper: Total Fixed Coûts (e.g., location, salaries, insurance) par pariod. Based on Coût accounting standards (e.g., GAAP, IFRS).

variablecostperunit.label: Variable Coût par unit
variablecostperunit.helper: Coût that varies with production Volume (e.g., Matériaus, labor). Standard in managerial accounting.

sellingpriceperunit.label: Selling Prix par unit
sellingpriceperunit.helper: Revenue par unit sold. Must exceed Variable Coût for positive contribution margin.

timeperiod.label: Time pariod
timeperiod.helper: pariod for which Fixed Coûts are defined. Aligns with financial reporting pariods.

targetprofit.label: Cible Profit
targetprofit.helper: Desired profit above break-even. utilisé for Cible Volume calculations.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data (e.g., based on historical accuracy). Adjusts results for uncertainty.

initialinvestment.label: Initial Investment
initialinvestment.helper: Total upfront Coût including equipment, installation, and training. Based on capital budgeting standards (NPV, IRR).

annualnetcashinflow.label: Annual Net Cash InDébit
annualnetcashinflow.helper: Expected annual incremental cash inDébits minus outDébits from the investment. Based on discounted cash Débit analysis.

projectlifetime.label: Project Lifetime
projectlifetime.helper: Expected Durée de vie utile of the investment. Typical range 1-50 Années based on asset depreciation standards (MACRS).

discountrate.label: Discount Taux
discountrate.helper: Coût of capital or required Taux of return. Based on CAPM or WACC standards.

salvagevalue.label: Valeur résiduelle
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated residual Valeur At end of project lifetime. Based on asset depreciation methods.

annualoperatingcost.label: Annual Oparating Coût
annualoperatingcost.helper: Recurring Coûts such as maintenance, labor, Énergie. Based on life cycle Coûting (ISO 15686).

annualrevenueincrease.label: Annual Revenue Increase
annualrevenueincrease.helper: Expected additional revenue from the investment. Based on market analysis and forecasting.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. utilisé for risk-adjusted ROI. Based on sensitivity analysis standards.

annualsalary.label: Annual Salary (Gross)
annualsalary.helper: Base annual gross salary par employee. Standard HR metric.

bonuspercentage.label: Bonus parcentage
bonuspercentage.helper: Annual bonus as parcentage of salary. Common in compensation packages.

employertaxrate.label: Employer Tax Taux (Social Security, etc.)

employertaxrate.helper: Employer-paid taxes (e.g., Social Security, Medicare in US). Varies by country.

benefitscost.label: Benefits Coût par Employee par Year
benefitscost.placeholder: Saisir benefits coût par employee par year
benefitscost.helper: Health insurance, retirement contributions, etc. Industry benchmark: ~30% of salary.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Taux (Facilities, IT, etc.)
overheadrate.helper: Indirect Coûts allocated par employee. Common in Coût accounting.

workingdaysperyear.label: Working Jours par Year
workingdaysperyear.helper: Standard working Jours (excluding weekends and holiJours). Typical: 260.

hoursperday.label: Heures par Day
hoursperday.helper: Standard working Heures par day. Typical: 8.

productiveutilization.label: Productive Utilization Taux
productiveutilization.helper: parcentage of paid time spent on productive work. Lean metric; typical 70-85%.

annualsalary.label: Annual Salary
annualsalary.helper: Base annual salary of the employee. Standard compensation practice.

benefitspercent.label: Benefits parcentage
benefitspercent.helper: parcentage of salary for benefits (health, retirement, etc.). Typical range 25-35%.

overheadpercent.label: Overhead parcentage
overheadpercent.helper: Indirect Coûts (facilities, equipment, admin). Industry benchmark 40-60%.

profitmarginpercent.label: Profit Margin parcentage
profitmarginpercent.helper: Desired profit margin on labor. Typical 10-30%.

paidhoursperyear.label: Paid Heures par Year
paidhoursperyear.helper: Total paid Heures (40 hrs/week * 52 weeks). Standard full-time.

billablehoursperyear.label: Heures facturables par Year
billablehoursperyear.helper: Heures actually billed to clients. Typically 85-90% of paid Heures.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor.

assetcost.label: Asset Coût
assetcost.helper: Initial Coût of the asset. Based on accounting standards (IAS 16, GAAP).

salvagevalue.label: Valeur résiduelle
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated residual Valeur At end of Durée de vie utile. par IAS 16.

usefullife.label: Durée de vie utile
usefullife.helper: Expected oparational life. Industry standards vary; typical range 3-30 Années.

depreciationmethod.label: Depreciation Method
depreciationmethod.helper: Common methods par GAAP and IFRS. Straight-line is simplest; declining-balance acceleTauxs expense.

decliningbalancefactor.label: Declining Balance Factor
decliningbalancefactor.helper: Factor for declining balance method (e.g., 2 for double-declining). Typical Valeurs: 1.5, 2, 2.5.

productionunits.label: Total Production Units
productionunits.helper: Estimated total units to be produced over life. utilisé in units-of-production method.

unitsproducedthisyear.label: Units Produced This Year
unitsproducedthisyear.helper: Actual units produced in Courant pariod for units-of-production method.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data (0-100%). utilisé for adjusted output.

accountsreceivable.label: Accounts Receivable (Alacaklar)
accountsreceivable.helper: Average accounts receivable balance. Based on standard financial statement analysis (GAAP/IFRS).

accountspayable.label: Accounts Payable (Borçlar)
accountspayable.helper: Average accounts payable balance. Standard financial metric.

inventory.label: Inventory (Stok)
inventory.helper: Average inventory Valeur. Based on supply chain management principles (APICS).

costofgoodssold.label: Coût of Goods Sold (COGS)
costofgoodssold.helper: Annual Coût of goods sold. Standard income statement item.

netsales.label: Net Sales (Net Satışlar)
netsales.helper: Annual Net sales revenue. Standard income statement item.

operatingexpenses.label: Oparating Expenses (Faaliyet Giderleri)
operatingexpenses.helper: Annual oparating expenses excluding COGS. Standard financial metric.

daysinperiod.label: Jours in pariod (Dönem Günü)
daysinperiod.helper: Number of Jours in the analysis pariod. Typically 365 for annual.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (Veri Güveni)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data quality. utilisé for adjusted outputs.

availabletimeperday.label: Available Time par Day (Heures)
availabletimeperday.helper: Total time machine is available par day, including planned downtime. Based on OEE (Efficacité globale des équipements) standard.

planneddowntimeperday.label: Planned Downtime par Day (Heures)
planneddowntimeperday.helper: Scheduled maintenance, breaks, etc. ISO 22400 for manufacturing oparations management.

unplanneddowntimeperday.label: Unplanned Downtime par Day (Heures)
unplanneddowntimeperday.helper: Breakdowns, Préparation, adjustments. Lean manufacturing focus on reducing unplanned downtime.

operatingspeed.label: Oparating Speed (units par hour)
operatingspeed.helper: Actual production speed. Compared to ideal speed for parformance calculation.

idealspeed.label: Ideal Speed (units par hour)
idealspeed.helper: Theoretical maximum speed. utilisé for parformance metric in OEE.

defectrate.label: Defect Taux (fraction)
defectrate.helper: Proportion of defective units. Quality metric in Six Sigma.

hourlycost.label: Hourly Coût (currency par hour)
hourlycost.helper: Machine oparating Coût including labor, Énergie, maintenance. utilisé for Coût analysis.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts final output for risk.

cuttinglength.label: Cutting Longueur
cuttinglength.helper: Total Longueur of Matériau to be cut along the tool path. Based on ISO 8688-1 tool life testing standards.

feedrate.label: Feed Taux
feedrate.helper: Linear feed speed of the cutting tool. Typical Valeurs from machinery handbook (e.g., 0.1-0.5 mm/rev for steel).

spindlespeed.label: Spindle Speed
spindlespeed.helper: Rotational speed of the spindle. DeDuréeines cutting speed; standard ranges par Matériau (e.g., 2000-6000 RPM for aluminum).

numberofpasses.label: Number of Passes
numberofpasses.helper: Number of cutting passes required to achieve final dimension. Based on Profondeur of cut and Matériau removal Taux.

rapidtraverserate.label: Rapid Traverse Taux
rapidtraverserate.helper: Maximum speed for non-cutting movements (tool positioning). Typical machine specs: 10-30 m/min.

rapiddistance.label: Rapid Traverse Distance
rapiddistance.helper: Total Distance traveled during rapid moves par cycle. Includes approach and retract.

toolchangetime.label: Tool Change Time
toolchangetime.helper: Time to change a tool. Typical automatic tool changer: 2-10 sec.

numberoftoolchanges.label: Number of Tool Changes
numberoftoolchanges.helper: Number of tool changes par cycle. Based on oparation sequence.

loadingunloadingtime.label: Loading/Unloading Time
loadingunloadingtime.helper: Time to load and unload workpiece. Manual: 20-60 sec; automated: 5-15 sec.

idletime.label: Idle Time par Cycle
idletime.helper: Non-productive time par cycle (e.g., dwell, inspection). Lean manufacturing focus on reducing idle time.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Low: ±20% uncertainty; Medium: ±10%; High: ±5%. Based on Six Sigma data quality assessment.

laborrate.label: Labor Taux
laborrate.helper: Hourly welder Taux

materialtype.label: Matériau Type
materialtype.helper: Matériau type affects cutting speed and Puissance requirements. Based on laser cutting industry standards (e.g., Trumpf, Bystronic).

materialthickness.label: Matériau Épaisseur
materialthickness.helper: Épaisseur directly impacts cutting speed and time. Typical range for laser cutting: 0.5-25 mm.

cuttinglength.label: Total Cutting Longueur
cuttinglength.helper: Total Longueur of cuts par part or batch. DeDuréeines primary cutting time.

cuttingspeed.label: Cutting Speed
cuttingspeed.helper: Speed depends on Matériau and Épaisseur. Typical Valeurs from machine manufacturer tables.

piercingtimeperpierce.label: Piercing Time par Pierce
piercingtimeperpierce.helper: Time to pierce the Matériau at start of each cut. Varies with Matériau and Épaisseur.

numberofpierces.label: Number of Pierces
numberofpierces.helper: Number of pierces par part or batch. Typically equals number of cut contours.

rapidtraversedistance.label: Rapid Traverse Distance
rapidtraversedistance.helper: Distance the laser head moves without cutting (positioning).

rapidtraversespeed.label: Rapid Traverse Speed
rapidtraversespeed.helper: Maximum positioning speed of the laser head. Typical: 60-120 m/min.

setuptime.label: Préparation Time
setuptime.helper: Time for loading Matériau, programming, and machine preparation.

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Number of identical parts in the batch. Affects Préparation amortization.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Coût par Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Oparator labor Coût including overhead. Typical range: $20-$80/h.

machinecostperhour.label: Machine Coût par Hour
machinecostperhour.helper: Machine depreciation, maintenance, Énergie, and Consommables. Typical: $30-$200/h.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects output adjustment for risk.

laborrate.label: Labor Taux
laborrate.helper: Oparator Taux

materialcostperkg.label: Matériau Coût par kg
materialcostperkg.helper: Coût of filament or resin par kilogram. Typical range for PLA: $20-50, ABS: $30-60, resin: $50-150. Source: industry benchmarks.

materialdensity.label: Matériau Densité
materialdensity.helper: Densité of printing Matériau. PLA ~1.24 g/cm³, ABS ~1.04 g/cm³, PETG ~1.27 g/cm³. utilisé to convert Volume to Poids.

partvolume.label: Part Volume
partvolume.helper: Volume of the printed part, typically from CAD model. Affects Matériau usage and print time.

infillpercentage.label: Infill parcentage
infillpercentage.helper: parcentage of internal Volume filled with Matériau. 0% for hollow, 100% for solid. Affects Matériau usage and strength.

printtimehours.label: Print Time
printtimehours.helper: Estimated print Durée. Affects machine and labor Coût. Typical range: 1-100 Heures.

machinecostperhour.label: Machine Coût par Hour
machinecostperhour.helper: Depreciation, maintenance, and Electricity Coût par hour. For a $2000 printer over 2000 Heures: $1/hour plus electricity $0.1-0.5/hour.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Coût par Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Oparator's hourly wage including overhead. Affects post-processing and monitoring time.

postprocessingtimehours.label: Post-Processing Time
postprocessingtimehours.helper: Time for support removal, sanding, painting, etc. Affects labor Coût.

failurerate.label: Failure Taux
failurerate.helper: parcentage of prints that fail. Affects effective Coût par successful part. Typical range: 2-20%.

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Number of identical parts printed in one run. Affects Préparation Coût amortization.

setupcost.label: Préparation Coût
setupcost.helper: One-time Coût for file preparation, bed leveling, etc. Amortized over batch size.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Taux
overheadrate.helper: parcentage added to direct Coûts for facility, admin, etc. Typical: 15-30%.

profitmargin.label: Profit Margin
profitmargin.helper: Desired profit margin on Total Coût. Typical: 20-50%.

materialtype.label: Matériau Type
materialtype.helper: Matériau Densité varies; standard densities from ASM Handbook.

thickness.label: Épaisseur
thickness.helper: Sheet Épaisseur; typical range 0.1-100 mm par ISO 3574.

width.label: Largeur
width.helper: Sheet Largeur; standard Largeurs up to 5000 mm.

length.label: Longueur
length.helper: Sheet Longueur; standard Longueurs up to 12000 mm.

unitsystem.label: Unit System
unitsystem.helper: Select measurement system; metric (mm, kg) or imparial (in, lb).

totalmaterialinput.label: Total Matériau Input
totalmaterialinput.helper: Total raw Matériau entering the production process. Based on ISO 14051 Matériau Débit Coût accounting (MFCA) standards.

goodoutput.label: Production conforme
goodoutput.helper: Quantité of product meeting quality specifications. Derived from Six Sigma yield metrics.

scraprate.label: Scrap Taux
scraprate.helper: parcentage of Matériau that becomes scrap during processing. Based on lean manufacturing parte reduction principles.

reworkrate.label: Rework Taux
reworkrate.helper: parcentage of output requiring rework. Common metric in quality management (ISO 9001).

materialcostperkg.label: Matériau Coût par kg
materialcostperkg.helper: Purchase Coût of raw Matériau par kilogram. utilisé for financial impact calculation.

disposalcostperkg.label: Disposal Coût par kg
disposalcostperkg.helper: Coût to dispose of parte Matériau. Environmental Coût factor par ISO 14000.

productionvolume.label: Production Volume
productionvolume.helper: Total units produced in the pariod. utilisé to scale parte calculations.

timeperiod.label: Time pariod
timeperiod.helper: Time basis for calculations. Enables scaling to annual parte and Coût.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability. Based on data quality assessment frameworks.

totalproductionquantity.label: Total Production Quantité
totalproductionquantity.helper: Total number of units produced in the pariod. Based on production records (ISO 9001).

scrapquantity.label: Scrap Quantité
scrapquantity.helper: Number of units scrapped due to defects or parte. Direct measure from quality control (Six Sigma).

reworkquantity.label: Rework Quantité
reworkquantity.helper: Units that required rework but not scrapped. Important for total parte analysis (Lean).

costperunit.label: Coût par unit
costperunit.helper: Average Coût to produce one unit including Matériaus, labor, overhead. utilisé for financial impact (Managerial Accounting).

reworkcostperunit.label: Rework Coût par unit
reworkcostperunit.helper: Additional Coût to rework one unit. Typically lower than original Coût but significant (Lean Accounting).

perioddays.label: pariod Jours
perioddays.helper: Number of Jours in the analysis pariod. utilisé for Taux normalization (standard reporting).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for outputs (risk management).

plannedproductiontime.label: Planned Production Time
plannedproductiontime.helper: Total time scheduled for production par shift/day. Based on ISO 22400 (KPIs for manufacturing oparations management).

operatingtime.label: Oparating Time
operatingtime.helper: Actual time the equipment is running (planned production time minus downtime). Key for Disponibilité calculation.

idealcycletime.label: Ideal Cycle Time
idealcycletime.helper: Theoretical minimum time to produce one unit under optimal conditions. utilisé in parformance calculation.

totalpartsproduced.label: Total Parts Produced
totalpartsproduced.helper: Total number of parts produced during oparating time. Includes both good and defective parts.

goodpartsproduced.label: Good Parts Produced
goodpartsproduced.helper: Number of parts meeting quality standards. utilisé in Quality calculation.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective assessment of data accuracy. Adjusts final OEE for uncertainty. Common in lean manufacturing assessments.

machinepurchasecost.label: Machine Purchase Coût
machinepurchasecost.helper: Initial capital investment for the machine. Based on standard Coût accounting principles (Maynard).

usefullifeyears.label: Durée de vie utile (Années)
usefullifeyears.helper: Expected oparational life of the machine. Typical range 5-20 Années par industry standards (ISO 15663).

salvagevalue.label: Valeur résiduelle
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated resale Valeur At end of Durée de vie utile. Usually 5-20% of Purchase Coût.

annualoperatinghours.label: Annual Oparating Heures
annualoperatinghours.helper: Total Heures the machine is opeTauxd par year. Based on typical single shift (2000 hrs) or multi-shift oparations.

maintenancecostperyear.label: Annual Maintenance Coût
maintenancecostperyear.helper: Average yearly maintenance expenses including parts and labor. Typically 2-5% of Purchase Coût.

energyconsumptionkw.label: Énergie Consommation (kW)
energyconsumptionkw.helper: Average Puissance draw during oparation. Based on machine specifications (ISO 50001).

energycostperkwh.label: Énergie Coût par kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Local electricity Taux. Varies by region; typical range $0.05-$0.30.

operatorlaborcostperhour.label: Oparator Labor Coût par Hour
operatorlaborcostperhour.placeholder: Saisir oparator labor coût par hour
operatorlaborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage including benefits for machine oparator. Based on labor market data.

floorspacesqft.label: Floor Space Occupied (sq ft)
floorspacesqft.helper: Surface occupied by the machine including clearance. utilisé for space Coût allocation.

annualfacilitycostpersqft.label: Annual Facility Coût par sq ft
annualfacilitycostpersqft.placeholder: Saisir annual facility coût par sq ft
annualfacilitycostpersqft.helper: Yearly Coût par square foot for location, utilities, insurance, etc. Typical $5-$20.

otherannualcosts.label: Other Annual Coûts
otherannualcosts.helper: Miscellaneous Coûts such as Consommables, software licenses, etc.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for final Taux.

workpiecematerial.label: Workpiece Matériau
workpiecematerial.helper: Matériau type deDuréeines recommended cutting speed range. Based on ISO 513 classification and machining handbooks (e.g., Machining Data Handbook, 3rd ed.).

toolmaterial.label: Tool Matériau
toolmaterial.helper: Tool Matériau affects cutting speed capability. Higher hardness Matériaus allow higher speeds. Reference: ISO 513.

operationtype.label: Oparation Type
operationtype.helper: Diffelocation oparations have diffelocation speed recommendations. Based on SME Tool Engineering Handbook.

cuttingspeed.label: Cutting Speed
cuttingspeed.helper: Actual cutting speed utilisé. Must be within recommended range for Matériau/tool combination. Reference: ISO 3685.

tooldiameter.label: Tool Diamètre
tooldiameter.helper: Diamètre of cutting tool (for milling/drilling). Affects spindle speed calculation. Reference: ISO 3002.

spindlespeed.label: Spindle Speed
spindlespeed.helper: Rotational speed of spindle. Calculated from cutting speed and Diamètre. Reference: ISO 230.

feedrate.label: Feed Taux
feedrate.helper: Feed par revolution. Affects surface finish and tool life. Reference: ISO 3685.

depthofcut.label: Profondeur of Cut
depthofcut.helper: Radial or axial Profondeur. Influences cutting forces and Puissance. Reference: ISO 3002.

toollife.label: Tool Life
toollife.helper: Expected tool life before replacement. utilisé for Coût analysis. Reference: Taylor's tool life equation.

machinepower.label: Machine Puissance
machinepower.helper: Available spindle Puissance. Must exceed required cutting Puissance. Reference: ISO 3002.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Adjusts output reliability. Common in risk analysis.

cuttingspeed.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
cuttingspeed.helper: ISO 3685:1993 - Tool-life testing with single-point turning tools. Cutting speed is the relative velocity between the tool and workpiece, affecting tool life and surface finish.

spindlespeed.label: Spindle Speed (n)
spindlespeed.helper: Calculated from cutting speed and workpiece Diamètre. Standard machining practice par ISO 3002-1.

numberofteeth.label: Number of Dents (z)
numberofteeth.helper: Number of cutting edges on the tool. Common for milling cutters; affects feed par tooth.

feedpertooth.label: Feed par Tooth (fz)
feedpertooth.helper: ISO 3002-1:1982 - Basic quantities in cutting and grinding. DeDuréeines chip load and surface finish.

materialtype.label: Matériau Type
materialtype.helper: Matériau proparties affect recommended cutting parameters. Based on Machining Data Handbook (Metcut) and ISO 513.

operationtype.label: Oparation Type
operationtype.helper: Diffelocation oparations have distinct Feed Taux formulas. Standard machining practice.

batchsize.label: Batch Size (units)
batchsize.helper: Total number of units started in the batch. Based on production planning standards (APICS).

goodunits.label: Unités conformes Output
goodunits.helper: Units meeting quality specifications. ISO 9001 quality metrics.

reworkunits.label: Rework Units
reworkunits.helper: Units that can be reworked to meet specs. Lean Six Sigma DMAIC.

scrapunits.label: Scrap Units
scrapunits.helper: Units that are scrapped. parte reduction metrics (Lean).

costperunit.label: Coût par unit ($)
costperunit.helper: Standard Coût par unit including Matériaus and labor. Managerial accounting.

reworkcostperunit.label: Rework Coût par unit ($)
reworkcostperunit.helper: Additional Coût to rework a unit. Coût of quality (COQ) analysis.

sellingpriceperunit.label: Selling Prix par unit ($)
sellingpriceperunit.helper: Revenue par good unit sold. Pricing stTauxgy.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. utilisé for risk adjustment.

powerconsumption.label: Puissance Consommation
powerconsumption.helper: Average Puissance Consommation of equipment in kilowatts. Based on ISO 50001 Énergie management standards.

operatinghours.label: Oparating Heures
operatinghours.helper: Total oparating Heures par billing pariod. Typically monthly or annually.

electricityrate.label: Electricity Taux
electricityrate.helper: Coût par kilowatt-hour from utility bill. Varies by region and tariff.

demandcharge.label: Demand Charge
demandcharge.helper: Peak demand charge par kW. Common in industrial tariffs.

peakdemand.label: Peak Demand
peakdemand.helper: Maximum Puissance demand during billing pariod. utilisé for demand charge calculation.

timeperiod.label: Time pariod
timeperiod.helper: Billing pariod for Coût calculation. Common in utility billing cycles.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. utilisé for risk-adjusted Coût estimates.

monthlyconsumption.label: Monthly Consommation
monthlyconsumption.helper: Total electricity Consommation par month in kilowatt-Heures. Based on utility billing data.

tariffrate.label: Tariff Taux
tariffrate.helper: Prix par kWh charged by utility. Varies by region and provider.

peakconsumption.label: Peak Consommation
peakconsumption.helper: Consommation during peak Heures if time-of-use pricing applies.

taxrate.label: Tax Taux
taxrate.helper: Applicable tax parcentage on Facture d'électricité.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy.

energyconsumed.label: Énergie Consumed
energyconsumed.helper: Total Énergie consumed in kilowatt-Heures over the measurement pariod. Based on ISO 50001 Énergie management standard.

productionoutput.label: Production Output
productionoutput.helper: Total units produced in the same pariod. utilisé to calculate Énergie intensity par unit.

operatinghours.label: Oparating Heures
operatinghours.helper: Total oparating Heures of the facility or equipment during the measurement pariod.

energycostperkwh.label: Énergie Coût par kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Average Coût of Énergie par kilowatt-hour. utilisé to calculate total Énergie Coût.

baselineenergyintensity.label: Baseline Énergie Intensity
baselineenergyintensity.helper: Industry benchmark or historical baseline Énergie intensity for comparison. Based on ISO 50001 Énergie parformance indicators.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in the accuracy of input data. Affects adjustment of results. Low confidence reduces reliability.

activitytype.label: Activity Type
activitytype.helper: ISO 14064-1:2018 greenhouse gas accounting; EPA emission factors.

quantity.label: Quantité
quantity.helper: Amount of activity (e.g., kWh for electricity, gallons for Carburant, miles for travel).

unit.label: Unit
unit.helper: Unit matching the activity type; conversion factors from IPCC guidelines.

emissionfactor.label: Emission Factor (kg CO2e par unit)
emissionfactor.placeholder: Saisir emission factor (kg co2e par unit)
emissionfactor.helper: Default factors from EPA eGRID or DEFRA; user can override for specific region.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Uncertainty adjustment par ISO 14064-3:2019; low confidence increases uncertainty margin.

includeoffset.label: Include Offsets
includeoffset.helper: If true, subtract purchased offsets from total emissions.

fueltype.label: Carburant Type
fueltype.helper: Carburant type deDuréeines emission factors par ISO 14064 and IPCC guidelines.

fuelconsumption.label: Carburant Consommation
fuelconsumption.helper: Total Carburant consumed in liters. Source: oparational records.

emissionfactor.label: Emission Factor
emissionfactor.helper: CO2 equivalent par liter. Default for diesel par IPCC 2006. For other Carburants, user can override.

operatinghours.label: Oparating Heures
operatinghours.helper: Heures of oparation par day. utilisé for time-based calculations.

daysperyear.label: Jours par Year
daysperyear.helper: Annual oparating Jours. Standard industrial assumption.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Affects adjustment factor par ISO 14064 uncertainty guidance.

panelcapacity.label: Panel Capacity (STC)
panelcapacity.helper: Standard Test Condition (STC) rating par panel. Based on IEC 61215 standard.

irradiance.label: Average Daily Irradiance
irradiance.helper: Peak Sun Heures (PSH) based on location. Source: NASA SSE or NREL PVWatts.

systemlosses.label: System Losses
systemlosses.helper: Includes wiring, inverter, temparature, shading, soiling, etc. Typical range 10-20% par NREL.

degradationrate.label: Annual Degradation Taux
degradationrate.helper: Typical 0.5-1% par year par manufacturer warranty. Based on IEC 61215.

systemcost.label: Total System Coût
systemcost.helper: Total installed Coût after incentives. utilisé for ROI calculation.

inverterefficiency.label: Inverter Efficiency
inverterefficiency.helper: Typical 95-98% for modern inverters. Based on IEC 61683.

tiltangle.label: Tilt Angle
tiltangle.helper: Panel tilt from horizontal. Optimal = latitude. Source: ASHRAE.

azimuthangle.label: Azimuth Angle
azimuthangle.helper: Direction panel faces: 0=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W. Optimal south in northern hemisphere.

ambienttemperature.label: Average Ambient Temparature
ambienttemperature.helper: Average daytime temparature during peak Sun Heures.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Adjusts output for uncertainty. Low = 0.8, Medium = 1.0, High = 1.1 multiplier.

surfacearea.label: Surface Surface
surfacearea.helper: Total Surface Surface of the object/pipe exposed to ambient. Based on ISO 12241:2008 for thermal insulation.

surfacetemperature.label: Surface Temparature
surfacetemperature.helper: Temparature of the outer surface of the insulation or object. Required for convective and radiative parte thermique calculation.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temparature
ambienttemperature.helper: Temparature of surrounding air. Standard ambient conditions par ISO 6946.

windspeed.label: Wind Speed
windspeed.helper: Air velocity over surface. Affects convective heat transfer coefficient. Based on ASHRAE Handbook.

emissivity.label: Emissivity
emissivity.helper: Surface emissivity for radiative heat transfer. Typical Valeurs: oxidized steel 0.8, polished metal 0.1. Based on ASTM C1371.

insulationthickness.label: Insulation Épaisseur
insulationthickness.helper: Épaisseur of insulation layer. utilisé to compute thermal resistance. Based on ISO 12241.

insulationconductivity.label: Insulation Thermal Conductivity
insulationconductivity.helper: Thermal conductivity of insulation Matériau. Typical: mineral wool 0.04, polyurethane 0.025. Based on ASTM C518.

operationhours.label: Oparation Heures par Year
operationhours.helper: Annual oparating Heures. utilisé to calculate annual Énergie loss. Standard industrial assumption.

energycost.label: Énergie Coût
energycost.helper: Coût of Énergie par kWh. utilisé to calculate financial loss. Based on local utility Tauxs.

fueltype.label: Carburant Type
fueltype.helper: Carburant type deDuréeines heating Valeur And combustion characteristics. Based on ASME PTC 4 and ISO 50001.

fuelconsumption.label: Carburant Consommation
fuelconsumption.helper: Mass or Volumetric Débit Taux of Carburant input. Essential for Énergie balance.

fuelheatingvalue.label: Carburant Heating Valeur (HHV)
fuelheatingvalue.helper: Higher Heating Valeur of Carburant. Standard test methods ASTM D240 for liquids, ASTM D5865 for solids.

steamflow.label: Steam Débit Taux
steamflow.helper: Mass Débit Taux of steam produced. Key output parameter.

steamenthalpy.label: Steam Enthalpy
steamenthalpy.helper: Enthalpy of steam at oparating Pression and temparature. From steam tables par ASME.

feedwaterenthalpy.label: Feedwater Enthalpy
feedwaterenthalpy.helper: Enthalpy of feedwater entering boiler. Typically at deaerator outlet temparature.

excessair.label: Excess Air parcentage
excessair.helper: Excess air utilisé for combustion. Affects flue gas losses. Typical range 10-50%.

fluegastemperature.label: Flue Gas Exit Temparature
fluegastemperature.helper: Temparature of flue gases leaving boiler. Higher temparature increases losses.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temparature
ambienttemperature.helper: Reference ambient temparature for parte thermique calculations.

radiationloss.label: Radiation and Convection Loss
radiationloss.helper: parte thermique from boiler surface. Typically 1-3% of input Énergie.

blowdownrate.label: Blowdown Taux
blowdownrate.helper: parcentage of boiler water discharged to control solids. Affects efficiency.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability.

compressorpower.label: Compressor Puissance
compressorpower.helper: Nominal Puissance rating of the compressor motor. Based on ISO 1217 standard for compressor parformance testing.

loadfactor.label: Facteur de charge
loadfactor.helper: parcentage of time the compressor opeTauxs at full load. Typical Valeurs from compressed air system audits (ISO 11011).

operatinghoursperday.label: Oparating Heures par Day
operatinghoursperday.helper: Daily oparating Heures. Based on shift patterns and production schedules.

operatingdaysperyear.label: Oparating Jours par Year
operatingdaysperyear.helper: Annual oparating Jours. Typical for industrial facilities.

electricitycost.label: Electricity Coût
electricitycost.helper: Average electricity Prix. Based on local utility Tauxs or EIA data.

motorefficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motorefficiency.helper: Efficiency of the electric motor. Based on NEMA MG1 or IEC 60034 standards.

compressortype.label: Compressor Type
compressortype.helper: Type of compressor affects maintenance and efficiency factors. Based on ISO 5390 classification.

maintenancefactor.label: Maintenance Factor
maintenancefactor.helper: Additional Énergie loss due to poor maintenance (e.g., leaks, dirty filters). Based on DOE compressed air guidelines.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. utilisé for risk-adjusted outputs.

sector.label: Sector
sector.helper: CBAM sectors as defined in EU Regulation 2023/956. Select the sector of the product.

productionvolume.label: Annual Production Volume
productionvolume.helper: Total annual production Volume of the product in tonnes. Required for calculating embedded emissions.

embeddedemissionsperton.label: Embedded Emissions par Tonne
embeddedemissionsperton.helper: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions embedded in one tonne of product, measured in tonnes of CO2 equivalent. Based on ISO 14064 and GHG Protocol.

carbonpriceorigin.label: Prix du carbone in Origin Country
carbonpriceorigin.placeholder: Saisir prix du carbone in origin country
carbonpriceorigin.helper: Courant Prix du carbone applicable in the country of origin. If no Prix du carbone, enter 0. Based on World Bank Carbon Pricing Dashboard.

cbamcertificateprice.label: CBAM Certificate Prix (EU ETS)
cbamcertificateprice.helper: Courant Prix of CBAM certificates, linked to EU ETS allowance Prix. Source: European Énergie Exchange (EEX).

freeallowancefactor.label: Free Allowance Factor
freeallowancefactor.helper: parcentage of emissions covered by free allowances during the transitional pariod. Default 0% for full exposure. Based on CBAM regulation.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in the input data. Low: estimated, Medium: industry average, High: verified. Affects confidence adjustment.

distance.label: Distance Traveled
distance.helper: Total Distance traveled by the vehicle. Based on standard odometer readings.

fuelused.label: Carburant utilisé
fuelused.helper: Volume of Carburant consumed during the trip. Measured at pump.

fueltype.label: Carburant Type
fueltype.helper: Type of Carburant utilisé. Affects Énergie Densité and CO2 emission factors. Reference: ISO 14064.

vehicletype.label: Vehicle Type
vehicletype.helper: Vehicle category for benchmarking. Reference: EPA Carburant economy standards.

drivingcondition.label: Driving Condition
drivingcondition.helper: Driving pattern affects Carburant efficiency. City driving has lower efficiency due to stops.

loadfactor.label: Facteur de charge
loadfactor.helper: parcentage of maximum load capacity. Higher load increases Carburant Consommation. Reference: ISO 50001.

maintenancescore.label: Maintenance Score
maintenancescore.helper: Vehicle maintenance condition (0=poor, 100=excellent). Poor maintenance increases Carburant use. Reference: Lean TPM.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. utilisé to adjust output reliability.

fuelprice.label: Carburant Prix par unit
fuelprice.helper: Courant market Prix par liter or kWh. Source: local Carburant Prix indices.

fueltype.label: Carburant Type
fueltype.helper: Carburant type deDuréeines Énergie Densité and Coût par unit. Based on standard Carburant classifications (ASTM D975 for diesel, ASTM D4814 for gasoline).

fuelconsumption.label: Carburant Consommation
fuelconsumption.helper: Average Carburant Consommation par 100 km. For electric vehicles, use kWh/100km. Based on EPA Carburant economy testing procedures.

distance.label: Distance Traveled
distance.helper: Total Distance traveled in the pariod. utilisé to calculate total Carburant utilisé.

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: Currency for Coût output. ISO 4217 currency codes.

period.label: pariod
period.helper: Time pariod for Coût calculation. utilisé to scale Distance if needed (e.g., monthly Distance).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted output. Based on data quality assessment (ISO 8000).

length.label: Longueur
length.helper: Physical dimension of the package. utilisé to calculate Volumetric Poids. Standard: ISO 6780.

width.label: Largeur
width.helper: Physical dimension of the package. utilisé to calculate Volumetric Poids. Standard: ISO 6780.

height.label: Hauteur
height.helper: Physical dimension of the package. utilisé to calculate Volumetric Poids. Standard: ISO 6780.

weight.label: Actual Poids
weight.helper: Actual Poids of the package. utilisé to compare with Volumetric Poids for chargeable Poids deDuréeination.

dimfactor.label: Dimensional Factor
dimfactor.helper: Conversion factor utilisé by carriers (e.g., 5000 for air freight, 6000 for road). Standard: IATA for air, CEN for road.

mode.label: Transport Mode
mode.helper: Transport mode affects the dimensional factor and Coût structure. Standard: IATA for air, CEN for road.

distancekm.label: Distance (km)
distancekm.helper: Total route Distance in kilometers. Standard unit for Transportation Distance.

fuelconsumptionperkm.label: Carburant Consommation (L/km)
fuelconsumptionperkm.helper: Average Carburant Consommation par kilometer. Based on vehicle specifications or historical data.

fuelpriceperliter.label: Carburant Prix ($/L)
fuelpriceperliter.helper: Courant Carburant Prix par liter. Market Taux.

driverhourlyrate.label: Driver Hourly Taux ($/h)
driverhourlyrate.helper: Driver wage par hour. Includes benefits and overhead.

averagespeedkmh.label: Average Speed (km/h)
averagespeedkmh.helper: Expected average speed including traffic and stops.

value.helper: Input Longueur Valeur to be converted. Based on SI standard (ISO 80000-3).

tounit.helper: Cible unit of Longueur. Supports SI and imparial units par ISO 80000-3 and ASTM E380.

value.label: Valeur
value.helper: The numeric Valeur of the Surface to be converted. Based on SI unit standard (ISO 80000-3).

fromunit.label: Unité source
fromunit.helper: The unit of the input Surface. Common units based on international standards (ISO 80000-3) and US customary units.

tounit.label: To Unit
tounit.helper: The Cible unit for conversion. Same standards as fromUnit.

powerfactor.label: Güç Faktörü (cos φ)
powerfactor.helper: AC devrelerde aktif gücün görünür güce oranı. IEEE 1459 standardına göre tanımlanır. Endüstriyel tesislerde tipik 0.8-0.95 arası.

current.label: Akım (Ampar)
current.helper: Elektrik akımı değeri, amparmetre ile ölçülür. IEC 60038 standardına göre nominal akım değerleri.

voltage.label: Gerilim (Volt)
voltage.helper: Faz-nötr veya faz-faz gerilimi. IEC 60038 standart gerilim seviyeleri (230V, 400V, 690V vb.).

phasetype.label: Faz Türü
phasetype.helper: Tek faz veya üç faz sistemi. IEC 60364 tesisat standardına göre seçim.

efficiency.label: Verim (%)
efficiency.helper: Motor, jeneratör veya dönüştürücü verimi. IEC 60034-2 motor verim standardı.

odahacmi.label: Oda Hacmi (m³)
odahacmi.helper: Odanın genişlik, uzunluk ve yükseklik çarpımı. Standart: ASHRAE Handbook - HVAC Systems and Equipment.

kisisayisi.label: Kişi Sayısı
kisisayisi.helper: Odada bulunan ortalama kişi sayısı. Her kişi yaklaşık 100-150 W ısı yükü ekler. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

pencerealani.label: Pencere Alanı (m²)
pencerealani.helper: Güneş ışınımından kaynaklı ısı kazancı için. Standart: ASHRAE Solar Heat Gain Coefficients.

pencereyonu.label: Pencere Yönü
pencereyonu.helper: Güneş ışınımı faktörü yöne göre değişir. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

yalitimseviyesi.label: Yalıtım Seviyesi
yalitimseviyesi.helper: Binanın yalıtım kalitesi. Zayıf: yüksek ısı transferi, İyi: düşük. Standart: TS 825 (Türkiye) veya ISO 6946.

cihazgucu.label: Elektrikli Cihaz Gücü (W)
cihazgucu.helper: Odadaki bilgisayar, TV vb. cihazların toplam gücü. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

aydinlatmagucu.label: Aydınlatma Gücü (W)
aydinlatmagucu.helper: Aydınlatma armatürlerinin toplam gücü. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. 1: yüksek güven, 0: düşük. Premium özellikler için kullanılır.

civatacapi.label: Cıvata Çapı (mm)
civatacapi.helper: Cıvatanın nominal çapı. ISO 898-1 standardına göre mekanik özellikler çapa bağlıdır.

adim.label: Adım (mm)
adim.helper: Diş adımı. Metrik dişler için standart değerler ISO 261'e göre belirlenir.

surtunmekatsayisi.label: Sürtünme Katsayısı
surtunmekatsayisi.helper: Diş ve oturma yüzeyi sürtünme katsayısı. VDI 2230 standardına göre tipik değerler 0.08-0.20 arasıdır.

onyuklemekuvveti.label: Ön Yükleme Kuvveti (kN)
onyuklemekuvveti.helper: Cıvataya uygulanması istenen eksenel ön yükleme kuvveti. Tasarım gereksinimine göre belirlenir.

malzemesinifi.label: Malzeme Sınıfı
malzemesinifi.helper: Cıvata malzeme sınıfı. ISO 898-1'e göre mekanik özellikleri belirler. Akma dayanımı ve çekme dayanımı sınıfa bağlıdır.

yaglamali.label: Yağlamalı Montaj
yaglamali.helper: Montaj sırasında yağlama yapılıp yapılmadığı. Yağlama sürtünme katsayısını düşürür ve tork değerini etkiler.

vehicletype.label: Araç Türü
vehicletype.helper: Türkiye'de MTV hesaplamasında araç türü belirleyicidir. 197 sayılı Motorlu Taşıtlar Vergisi Kanunu'na göre sınıflandırma yapılır.

enginedisplacement.label: Motor Silindir Hacmi (cm³)
enginedisplacement.helper: Motor hacmi MTV dilimlerini belirler. 197 sayılı Kanun'da yer alan tarifeye göre 1300, 1600, 1800, 2000, 2500, 3000, 4000 cm³ eşik değerleri kullanılır.

vehicleage.label: Araç Yaşı (yıl)
vehicleage.helper: Araç yaşı arttıkça MTV oranı düşer. Kanun'da 1-3, 4-6, 7-11, 12-15, 16+ yaş dilimleri tanımlanmıştır.

ishybridorelectric.label: Hibrit/Elektrikli Araç
ishybridorelectric.helper: Elektrikli ve bazı hibrit araçlar için MTV indirimi veya muafiyeti uygulanır. 197 sayılı Kanun ve çevre dostu araç teşvikleri kapsamında değerlendirilir.

taxyear.label: Vergi Yılı
taxyear.helper: Her yıl yeniden değerleme oranında güncellenen MTV tutarları için yıl bilgisi gereklidir. Hazine ve Maliye Bakanlığı tarafından yayımlanan tarifeler kullanılır.

value.label: Basınç Değeri
value.helper: Kullanıcının dönüştürmek istediği basınç değeri. Endüstriyel uygulamalarda yaygın olarak kullanılan birimlerden biridir. ISO 80000-4:2006 standardına dayanır.

fromunit.label: Kaynak Birim
fromunit.helper: Dönüştürülecek basınç birimi. Mühendislikte yaygın kullanılan birimler: bar (metrik), psi (İngiliz sistemi), pascal (SI).

horsepower.label: Beygir Gücü (HP)
horsepower.helper: Güç değeri, genellikle motor veya türbin gibi makinelerin parformansını ifade eder. Endüstriyel standartlarda (ISO 80000-4) kullanılır.

horsepowertype.label: Beygir Gücü Türü
horsepowertype.helper: Farklı tanımlar (mekanik, metrik, elektrik, kazan) farklı dönüşüm katsayıları gerektirir. ISO 80000-4 ve IEEE standartlarına dayanır.

profiltipi.label: Profil Tipi
profiltipi.helper: NPU ve NPI profilleri farklı geometrik özelliklere sahiptir. Standart: DIN 1026-1 (NPU) ve DIN 1026-2 (NPI).

profilboyutu.label: Profil Boyutu (mm)
profilboyutu.helper: Profilin nominal yüksekliği (h). Standart boyutlar DIN 1026'ya göre belirlenmiştir.

profilkalitesi.label: Profil Kalitesi (Çelik Sınıfı)
profilkalitesi.helper: Çelik sınıfı, yoğunluğu ve mekanik özellikleri etkiler. Standart: EN 10025-2.

profiluzunlugu.label: Profil Uzunluğu (m)
profiluzunlugu.helper: Standart profil boyu genellikle 6 m veya 12 m'dir. Müşteri talebine göre değişebilir.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güvenilirliği
dataconfidence.helper: Kullanılan verilerin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük güvenilirlikte sonuçlar bir güvenlik faktörü ile çarpılır.

length.label: Boy (m)
length.helper: Profilin metre cinsinden boyu. Standart boylar genellikle 6 m veya 12 m'dir.

profiletype.label: Profil Tipi
profiletype.helper: Köşebent lama profilleri genellikle eşit veya eşit olmayan kollu olarak üretilir. TS 914 EN 10056-1 standardına göre sınıflandırılır.

widtha.label: Genişlik A (mm)
widtha.helper: Köşebentin birinci kenar genişliği. TS 914 EN 10056-1'e göre standart ölçüler 20-250 mm arasındadır.

widthb.label: Genişlik B (mm)
widthb.helper: Köşebentin ikinci kenar genişliği. Eşit kollu profillerde LargeurA ile aynı, eşit olmayan kolluda farklı olabilir.

thickness.label: Et Kalınlığı (mm)
thickness.helper: Köşebent lama et kalınlığı. TS 914 EN 10056-1'e göre 3-25 mm arası standart kalınlıklar.

materialdensity.label: Malzeme Yoğunluğu (kg/m³)
materialdensity.helper: Çelik için tipik yoğunluk 7850 kg/m³. Paslanmaz çelik veya alüminyum gibi farklı malzemeler için değişir. ISO 630-1 referans alınır.

quantity.label: Adet
quantity.helper: Hesaplanacak profil adedi. Toplam ağırlık için adet ile çarpılır.

discap.label: Dış Çap (mm)
discap.helper: Boru dış çapı, standart boru boyutlarına göre (ISO 4200, ASTM A53) belirlenir.

etkal.label: Et Kalınlığı (mm)
etkal.helper: Boru cidar kalınlığı, basınç sınıfına ve standarda (ASME B36.10, EN 10255) göre seçilir.

boy.label: Boru Boyu (m)
boy.helper: Standart boru boyları genellikle 6 m veya 12 m'dir (ISO 4200).

malzeme.label: Malzeme Türü
malzeme.helper: Çelik (yoğunluk 7850 kg/m³) veya paslanmaz çelik (yoğunluk 7930 kg/m³) seçimi, ağırlık hesaplamasında kullanılır.

powerkw.label: Güç (kW)
powerkw.helper: Motor gücü kilowatt cinsinden. ISO 80000-4 standardına göre SI birimi.

powerhp.label: Güç (HP)
powerhp.helper: Motor gücü beygir gücü cinsinden. Metrik HP (PS) kullanılır; 1 HP = 0.7355 kW (metrik).

conversiontype.label: Dönüşüm Yönü
conversiontype.helper: Dönüşüm yönü seçimi: kW'tan HP'ye veya HP'den kW'a.

toplamgucihtiyaci.label: Toplam Güç İhtiyacı (kVA)
toplamgucihtiyaci.helper: Toplam yükün başlangıç ve çalışma anındaki güç ihtiyacı. ISO 8528 standardına göre jeneratör kapasitesi belirlenir.

yedeklilikfaktoru.label: Yedeklilik Faktörü
yedeklilikfaktoru.helper: Kritik yükler için yedek kapasite oranı. Genellikle 1.1-1.3 arası, kritik tesislerde 1.5-2.0.

calismasuresigunluk.label: Günlük Çalışma Süresi (saat)
calismasuresigunluk.helper: Jeneratörün günlük ortalama çalışma süresi. Sürekli çalışma için 24 saat.

calismagunuaylik.label: Aylık Çalışma Günü
calismagunuaylik.helper: Aylık ortalama çalışma günü sayısı. Vardiya düzenine göre değişir.

yakittuketimorani.label: Yakıt Tüketim Oranı (L/kWh)
yakittuketimorani.helper: Jeneratörün ürettiği her kWh başına tükettiği yakıt miktarı. Dizel jeneratörlerde tipik 0.2-0.4 L/kWh.

yakitfiyati.label: Yakıt Fiyatı (TL/L)
yakitfiyati.helper: Güncel yakıt fiyatı. EPDK verileri baz alınabilir.

jeneratortipi.label: Jeneratör Tipi
jeneratortipi.helper: Jeneratörün yakıt türü. Dizel en yaygın, gaz daha temiz, benzin daha az verimli.

bakimmaliyetiyillik.label: Yıllık Bakım Maliyeti (TL)
bakimmaliyetiyillik.helper: Jeneratörün yıllık pariyodik bakım maliyeti. Üretici önerileri ve işletme koşullarına göre değişir.

yatirimmaliyeti.label: Yatırım Maliyeti (TL)
