contingencypercentage.helper: Contingency reserve for unforeseen Coûts. Recommended 10-20% par project management standards (PMBOK).

projectdurationmonths.label: Project Durée
projectdurationmonths.helper: Expected Durée of renovation project in months. Affects financing Coûts and escalation.

inflationrate.label: Annual Inflation Taux
inflationrate.helper: Expected annual Inflation Taux for construction Coûts. Based on economic forecasts (e.g., World Bank).

financingrate.label: Annual Financing Taux
financingrate.helper: Annual interest Taux for project financing. Based on Courant market Tauxs (e.g., LIBOR + spread).

energysavingsperyear.label: Annual Énergie Savings
energysavingsperyear.helper: Expected annual Énergie Coût savings after renovation. Based on Énergie audit (ISO 50001).

maintenancesavingsperyear.label: Annual Maintenance Savings
maintenancesavingsperyear.helper: Expected annual maintenance Coût savings after renovation. Based on historical data.

propertyvalueincrease.label: Proparty Valeur Increase
propertyvalueincrease.helper: Expected increase in proparty Valeur After renovation. Based on real estate appraisal standards.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level of input data. Affects risk adjustment. Low = 0.8, Medium = 0.9, High = 1.0 multiplier.

repairtimehours.label: Repair Time (Heures)
repairtimehours.helper: Actual or estimated repair Durée. Based on industrial engineering time studies (Maynard) and maintenance benchmarks.

hourlylaborcost.label: Hourly Labor Coût ($/hour)
hourlylaborcost.helper: Fully burdened Labor Taux including overhead. Standard Coût accounting practice.

partscost.label: Parts Coût ($)
partscost.helper: Coût of replacement parts. Procurement data.

downtimecostperhour.label: Downtime Coût par Hour ($/hour)
downtimecostperhour.helper: Lost revenue or production Coût par hour of downtime. Based on throughput accounting.

repairmode.label: Repair Mode
repairmode.helper: Standard: normal shift; Emergency: overtime premium; Premium: expedited parts and labor. Lean/SMED classification.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. utilisé for risk adjustment. ISO 9001 data quality.

ingredientcostperkg.label: İçerik Maliyeti (kg başına)
ingredientcostperkg.helper: Hammadde maliyeti, tabak maliyetinin ana bileşenidir. ISO 9001 kalite yöNetimi kapsamında tedarikçi fiyatları dikkate alınır.

portionweight.label: Porsiyon Ağırlığı
portionweight.helper: Standart porsiyon büyüklüğü, menü mühendisliği prensiplerine göre belirlenir. Lean üretimde israfı önlemek için optimize edilir.

laborcostperhour.label: İşçilik Maliyeti (saat başına)
laborcostperhour.helper: Mutfak parsonelinin saatlik ücreti. Endüstri mühendisliğinde iş ölçümü ve zaman etüdü ile belirlenir.

preptimeperportion.label: Porsiyon Başına Hazırlık Süresi
preptimeperportion.helper: Bir porsiyonun hazırlanması için geçen süre. Maynard'ın iş etüdü prensiplerine dayanır.

overheadrate.label: Genel Gider Oranı
overheadrate.helper: Kira, elektrik, su gibi dolaylı maliyetlerin yüzdesi. Finansal analizde standart maliyet muhasebesi yöntemi.

wastepercentage.label: Fire Oranı
wastepercentage.helper: Üretim sırasında oluşan atık yüzdesi. Six Sigma'da israf azaltma hedefi.

desiredprofitmargin.label: Hedef Kar Marjı
desiredprofitmargin.helper: Restoranın hedeflediği kar oranı. Finansal oran analizinde kullanılır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Risk yöNetiminde kullanılır.

roofarea.label: Roof Surface
roofarea.helper: Total Roof Surface to be covered. Standard measure in roofing industry (ASTM D6630).

materialcostpersquare.label: Matériau Coût par Square
materialcostpersquare.helper: Coût of roofing Matériau par square (100 sq ft). Industry standard unit (NRCA).

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Coût par Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage for roofing labor. Based on prevailing wage Tauxs (BLS).

laborhourspersquare.label: Labor Heures par Square
laborhourspersquare.helper: Estimated Labor Heures required par square. Industry benchmarks (RSMeans).

wastefactor.label: parte Factor
wastefactor.helper: parcentage of Matériau parte due to cutting, overlap, etc. Typical range 5-15% (ASTM D6630).

overheadrate.label: Overhead Taux
overheadrate.helper: Overhead as parcentage of direct Coûts (labor + Matériau). Standard construction accounting (AIA).

profitmargin.label: Profit Margin
profitmargin.helper: Desired profit margin on Total Coût. Typical 15-25% (NRCA).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Adjusts final Coût for uncertainty (risk management).

channelname.label: Satış Kanalı Adı
channelname.helper: Karşılaştırma yapılacak satış kanalının seçimi. Endüstri standardı olarak kanal bazlı karlılık analizi yaygındır.

revenue.label: Toplam Gelir
revenue.helper: Kanal üzerinden elde edilen toplam satış geliri. Finansal tablolardan alınır.

costofgoodssold.label: Satılan Malın Maliyeti
costofgoodssold.helper: Ürünlerin maliyeti; hammadde, işçilik ve genel üretim giderlerini içerir. Muhasebe standardı.

marketingcost.label: Pazarlama Maliyeti
marketingcost.helper: Kanal için yapılan reklam, promosyon ve dijital pazarlama harcamaları.

salescost.label: Satış Maliyeti
salescost.helper: Satış ekibi maaşları, komisyonlar ve satışla ilgili diğer giderler.

logisticscost.label: Lojistik Maliyeti
logisticscost.helper: Nakliye, depolama ve dağıtım maliyetleri. Tedarik zinciri yöNetimi standardı.

overheadcost.label: Genel Gider
overheadcost.helper: Kanal için tahsis edilen genel yöNetim giderleri (kira, elektrik, vb.).

returnrate.label: İade Oranı
returnrate.helper: Satılan ürünlerin iade yüzdesi. İade maliyetleri karlılığı etkiler.

discountrate.label: İskonto Oranı
discountrate.helper: Kanalda uygulanan ortalama iskonto oranı. Net geliri düşürür.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Verilerin güvenilirlik yüzdesi. Düşükse sonuçlar düzeltilir.

revenue.label: Total Revenue
revenue.helper: Total sales revenue for the pariod. Based on standard financial reporting (GAAP/IFRS).

cogs.label: Coût of Goods Sold
cogs.helper: Direct Coûts attributable to production. Includes Matériaus, labor, overhead. ISO 9001 Coût accounting guidelines.

operatingexpenses.label: Oparating Expenses
operatingexpenses.helper: SG&A, R&D, depreciation, etc. Excludes interest and taxes. Standard income statement classification.

otherincome.label: Other Income
otherincome.helper: Non-oparating income (e.g., interest, gains). Included for comprehensive margin calculation.

taxrate.label: Effective Tax Taux
taxrate.helper: Effective corpoTaux tax Taux. Based on jurisdiction and tax laws.

perioddays.label: pariod Longueur (Jours)
perioddays.helper: Number of Jours in the reporting pariod. utilisé for annualization if needed.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted outputs. Based on data quality assessment (Six Sigma DMAIC).

annualdemand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annualdemand.helper: Annual demand for the product. utilisé to calculate economic order Quantité and Préparation Coût par unit. Based on EOQ model (Harris, 1913) and lean manufacturing principles.

setuptime.label: Préparation Time (minutes)
setuptime.helper: Time required to change over from one product to another. Key metric in SMED (Shingo, 1985) to reduce parte and improve flexibility.

hourlycost.label: Hourly Coût of Préparation Labor ($/hour)
hourlycost.placeholder: Saisir hourly coût of préparation labor ($/hour)
hourlycost.helper: Labor Coût par hour for Préparation activities. Includes wages, benefits, and overhead. utilisé to calculate Préparation Coût par Préparation.

holdingcostperunit.label: Holding Coût par unit par Year ($)
holdingcostperunit.placeholder: Saisir holding coût par unit par year ($)
holdingcostperunit.helper: Coût to hold one unit of inventory for one year. Includes storage, insurance, obsolescence, and opportunity Coût. Based on inventory carrying Coût standards (APICS).

productionrate.label: Production Taux (units par hour)
productionrate.helper: Number of units produced par hour during production. utilisé to calculate production time and economic production Quantité (EPQ) model.

workingdaysperyear.label: Working Jours par Year
workingdaysperyear.helper: Number of working Jours par year. utilisé to convert annual demand to daily demand. Typical Valeur 250 (5 Jours/week, 50 weeks).

hourspershift.label: Heures par Shift
hourspershift.helper: Number of Heures in a shift. utilisé to calculate available production time par day.

shiftsperday.label: Shifts par Day
shiftsperday.helper: Number of shifts par day. Affects available production time.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. utilisé to adjust output for uncertainty. 1 = high confidence, 0 = low confidence.

targetvalue.label: Hedef Değer (m)
targetvalue.helper: Taguchi kalite kayıp fonksiyonunda hedef değer, ürünün ideal parformansını temsil eder. ISO 9001:2015 kalite yöNetim sistemleri standardına dayanır.

actualvalue.label: Gerçekleşen Değer (y)
actualvalue.helper: Üretim sürecinde ölçülen gerçek değer. Taguchi metodolojisinde hedeften sapma kalite kaybına neden olur.

tolerance.label: Tolerans (Δ)
tolerance.helper: Spesifikasyon limitlerinin yarısı (USL-LSL)/2. Mühendislik toleransı, ürünün kabul edilebilir sapma aralığını belirler.

lossattolerance.label: Tolerans Sınırındaki Kayıp (A₀)
lossattolerance.helper: Tolerans sınırında (spesifikasyon limitinde) oluşan kalite kaybının parasal değeri. Genellikle hurda, yeniden işleme veya müşteri memnuniyetsizliği maliyetlerine dayanır.

productionvolume.label: Üretim Miktarı
productionvolume.helper: Değerlendirilen dönemdeki toplam üretim adedi. Toplam kalite kaybını hesaplamak için kullanılır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güven Düzeyi
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliğini ifade eder. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar daha muhafazakar hale getirilir.

setuptimecurrent.label: Courant Préparation Time (minutes)
setuptimecurrent.helper: Courant time to change tool holder and fixture. Based on SMED methodology (Shingo, 1985).

numworkers.label: Number of Workers
numworkers.helper: Workers involved in Préparation. Lean standard: single-minute exchange of die (SMED) aims for 1 worker.

hourlylaborcost.label: Hourly Labor Coût par Worker
hourlylaborcost.placeholder: Saisir hourly labor coût par worker
hourlylaborcost.helper: Average wage including overhead. Industry benchmark from BLS or local data.

numsetupsperday.label: Number of Préparations par Day
numsetupsperday.placeholder: Saisir number of préparations par day
numsetupsperday.helper: Frequency of tool/fixture changes. Affects total daily downtime.

machinehourlycost.label: Machine Hourly Coût
machinehourlycost.helper: Coût of machine downtime including depreciation, Énergie, maintenance. Based on standard Machine hour Taux.

defectrateaftersetup.label: Defect Taux After Préparation
defectrateaftersetup.helper: parcentage of defective parts produced after Préparation until process stabilizes. Quality metric par ISO 9001.

productionrateperhour.label: Production Taux par Hour
productionrateperhour.helper: Number of parts produced par hour during stable production. utilisé to calculate lost production due to defects.

partcost.label: Coût par part
partcost.helper: Matériau and variable Coût par part. utilisé to quantify defect Coût.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for outputs.

sectorFooter.tagline: Outils de calcul sectoriels pour la production, l'industrie et les décisions opérationnelles.
sectorFooter.noteBody: Les calculateurs servent à l'évaluation préliminaire et à l'aide à la décision. Vérifiez avec vos propres données avant toute décision commerciale critique.

calculatorLibrary.lead: Index lisibles par machine et entrées catalogue pour les calculateurs sectoriels SectorCalc.

inputGuide.title: Guide de saisie
inputGuide.description: Ce schéma indique quelle mesure ou quelle valeur correspond à chaque champ.

standard.title: Usage agreement
standard.body: This calculation provides a preliminary assessment based on your inputs and deterministic methodology. Results do not replace quotes, investment, engineering, tax, legal, or safety decisions. For critical decisions, verify with your own data, qualified experts, and applicable regulations.

elevated.title: Important usage notice
elevated.body: This tool models commercial or compliance-sensitive exposure. Outputs are indicative only and must be validated against your contracts, payroll records, and local rules before action.

engineering.title: Engineering reference notice
engineering.body: This tool provides standard-referenced pre-calculation only. Final design, safety, and conformity decisions require authorized engineering review.

standards.selectorNote: Default follows region; you may switch reference systems for comparison.
standards.engineeringWarning: This tool provides standard-referenced pre-calculation only. Final design, safety, and conformity decisions require authorized engineering review.

calculationFeedback.prompt: See an error in this result?
